name: vendor.myndhyve.app-builder
description: MyndHyve App Builder typeIds — app-builder.per-screen (single-task screen generation: chat-send → typed-envelope-await with bounded retry) + app-builder.iterate-tasks (multi-task serial loop over feature tasks with task-level failure isolation). Both consume host.chat + host.aiEnvelope.await. Host concerns (progress cards, telemetry, pilot materializer) intentionally NOT in pack — pack returns categorized task results that host MAY render however it wishes.
author: MyndHyve
